---
title: "Contact"
---

**Social Networks Group – UC**
Institute of Sociology, Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile
Santiago, Chile

Email: [anespinosa@uc.cl](mailto:anespinosa@uc.cl)

<!-- TODO: confirm the group's institutional contact email — flyers in the shared
     drive show both "anespinosa@uc.cl" and "aespinos@uc.cl"; pick one and use it
     consistently across en/contact.qmd and es/contacto.qmd. Add postal address,
     office location, and social links once confirmed. -->
